content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Checklist item \"Attorney-review disclaimer included at top of output\" is not satisfied; the disclaimer appears near the end, not at the top.", "fix": "Move or duplicate the attorney-review disclaimer to the very beginning of the document."}, {"problem": "Checklist items about jurisdiction-specific rules (anti-indemnity, retainage, prompt payment, prevailing wage) are not addressed anywhere in the draft.", "fix": "Add a brief clause or review note confirming consideration of Washington-specific rules on anti-indemnity, retainage, prompt payment, and prevailing wage, or state they are not applicable to this NDA."}, {"problem": "Checklist item \"Flow-down obligations verified for subcontractor agreements\" is not addressed.", "fix": "Add a statement that no subcontractor flow-down obligations are applicable to this NDA, or include a clause if such flow-downs are intended."}, {"problem": "Checklist item \"NNN maintenance matrix populated; structural repairs not shifted to tenant without instruction\" is not addressed.", "fix": "Explicitly note that NNN/maintenance allocation is not applicable to this NDA, or include the required matrix if somehow relevant."}, {"problem": "Checklist item \"Ratification clause present for amendments and subleases\" is not addressed.", "fix": "Add a ratification clause or a short note that amendments/subleases are not applicable in this NDA context."}, {"problem": "Checklist item \"ADS fixed defaults applied and Pakistan labour law compliance table checked (Pipeline G only)\" is not addressed.", "fix": "State explicitly that ADS defaults and Pakistan labour law compliance are not applicable to this NDA, or include them if this is in fact a Pipeline G document."}]}
